recommendations.title: Judgment Night
recommendations.overview: Four young friends, while taking a shortcut en route to a local boxing match, witness a brutal murder which leaves them running for their lives.

recommendations.title: Kill Shot
recommendations.overview: Posing as hunters, a group of terrorists are in search of $100 million that was stolen and lost in a plane crash en route from Afghanistan.

recommendations.title: Headhunters
recommendations.overview: An accomplished headhunter risks everything to obtain a valuable painting owned by a former mercenary.

recommendations.title: Jailer
recommendations.overview: Muthuvel Pandian, a retired, stern yet compassionate jailer lives a peaceful life with his family, but trouble knocks his door when his cop son’s tryst with an antique mafia gang goes awry and forces Muthu to step back into a dark world he had volunt

recommendations.title: The Delta Force
recommendations.overview: A 707 aircraft jetliner, en route from Athens to Rome and then to New York City, is hijacked by Lebanese terrorists, who demand that the pilot take them to Beirut. What the terrorists don't realize is that an elite team of commandos have been called

recommendations.title: The Monk and the Gun
recommendations.overview: An American travels to Bhutan searching for a valuable antique rifle and crosses paths with a young monk who wanders through the serene mountains, instructed by his teacher to make things right again.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: The Eight Hundred
recommendations.overview: In 1937, eight hundred Chinese soldiers fight under siege from a warehouse in the middle of the Shanghai battlefield, completely surrounded by the Japanese army.

recommendations.title: Death of a Unicorn
recommendations.overview: A father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to a weekend retreat, where his billionaire boss seeks to exploit the creature’s miraculous curative properties.

recommendations.title: Give 'em Hell, Malone
recommendations.overview: A tough as nails private investigator (Malone) squares off with gangsters and their thugs to protect a valuable secret. Malone goes through hell to protect the information but he dishes some hell as well...
